name: NVIDIA's revenue by market segment
descriptionShort: NVIDIA’s self-reported quarterly revenue across its main market segments, in US dollars. NVIDIA is a key supplier of graphics processing units (GPUs), which have long powered gaming and now power much of today’s AI training. This data is not adjusted for inflation.
descriptionProcessing: We aligned NVIDIA's fiscal quarters with calendar quarters and assigned each data point to the first day of the quarter. Professional Visualization (workstations and design software), Automotive (automotive computing platforms), and OEM & Other (original equipment manufacturing and miscellaneous sales) segments are grouped together as "Other".
datasetName: NVIDIA Quarterly Revenue by Market Segment
descriptionKey: This indicator shows how NVIDIA’s revenue is split across its main lines of business over time.

It tracks how much the company earns each quarter from data center products, gaming, and other sectors. Revenue from professional visualization, automotive, and other OEM sales is grouped into the “Other” category.
The figures come from NVIDIA’s own financial reports, are self-reported by the company, and are shown in US dollars without adjusting for inflation.
Revenue is grouped by the end market each product is sold into, so changes in the areas reflect shifts in what NVIDIA sells and who its customers are.
Because it focuses on revenue rather than profit, the chart shows where NVIDIA’s sales are growing or shrinking, but not how profitable each line of business is or how many units it sells.

origins.titleSnapshot: NVIDIA Quarterly Revenue by Market Segment - Q4 FY2025
origins.title: NVIDIA Quarterly Revenue by Market Segment
origins.description:
Quarterly revenue data for NVIDIA Corporation broken down by market segments including Data Center, Gaming, Professional Visualization, Auto, and OEM & Other. Data is reported in millions of USD for each fiscal quarter.

NVIDIA's fiscal year ends in January, with quarters defined as:
- Q1: February-April
- Q2: May-July
- Q3: August-October
- Q4: November-January
origins.citationFull: NVIDIA Corporation - Quarterly Revenue Trends by Market Platform (2014-2025)
